In the press & in person

Press & Pop-Ups

From editorial features to seaside pop-ups — find us where the water meets the world.

As Seen In

From Vogue to Hello! — a few of our favourite features.

Vogue

"First look, new season — featuring Tidal Swimwear in our Great British Summer edit."

Marie Claire

"This stylish swimwear will 100% flatter all body shapes."

Hello! Loves

"Sun, sea and sand are calling — get ready to pack your bags with our pick of beautiful beachwear."

Daily Mail

"Sizzling bikini snap — spotted in Tidal Swimwear."

Hello! Weddings

"Millie Mackintosh in Tidal Swimwear — Majorca exclusive."

Boutique Hotel Selection

"Tidal Swimwear featured in the Carpe Diem boutique hotel edit."

Press & Editorial

Samples & Enquiries

For press requests, editorial loans, collaboration proposals or interview enquiries, please reach out directly. We aim to respond to all press requests within two business days.

Get in Touch

Find Us In Person

We believe in the joy of trying things on. Our pop-ups bring the full collection — and the team — to you.

From the South of France to the English coast, we set up shop in beautiful locations throughout the season. All pieces from the current collection are available to try and take away on the day.
